mnemonics: P-TIME (Personal, Traditional, Immersive, Mobile, Embedded) for the main computing environments
keyPoints: Traditional computing refers to desktop and laptop environments used by a single user
Mobile computing involves smartphones and tablets with touch interfaces and sensors
Embedded systems are specialized computers within larger mechanical systems
commonMistakes: Confusing cloud computing with distributed systems (cloud is a type of distributed system)
Assuming all mobile devices run the same operating systems as desktop computers
Thinking embedded systems have the same requirements as general-purpose computers
